Mano Kapazoglou
  • get cv

Product Design

Hi, I'm Mano, a Product Designer specialising in Healthcare. The last several years I've been designing digital experiences for cancer patients, fitness users, and healthcare provider contexts, navigating the messy overlap between clinical compliance and human-centred design. My work focuses on behavioural science and cognitive inclusivity: I design best for people where clarity genuinely matters.

Product Design in Practice

A curated selection of interconnected projects that showcase my design philosophy, methodology and its impact.

Design System Rollout & Management

Built a design system from scratch, unifying iOS & Android, enabling localisation into UK and US markets, and giving developers a single source of truth for the first time.

Patient Support Features

Collaborated with a behavioural scientist to design modular distress management flows supporting BCT-based A/B testing, improving retention and fulfilling a key research partnership.

App Architecture for Behavioural Change

Redesigned Mika Health’s entire app flow from the ground up: removing dead ends; creating a purposeful retention loop; and introducing personalisation for cancer patients. Wireframes tested well; MVP commissioned.

Other works

Most product designers haven't also drawn a surgical procedure, photographed a skull, animated with sand, or made boardgames. While product design is where I focus, my broader background shapes how I approach every problem: with curiosity, craft, and a genuine interest in what humans are actually going through, especially at their most vulnerable.

No projects match this category on this page.

AI-Assisted & Generative Design

Experiments in AI assisted, algorithmic and generative design: turning data structures into visual forms.

Board Game Development

Designed, playtested, and iterated an original board game from concept to print-ready.

Finds & Remains Photography [CW: Skulls]

Photography of archaeological finds and human remains for the research archive of Headland Archaeology.

CAHID Art [CW: Cadavers]

Exploring the intersection of science, mortality, and the human form at one of the UK’s leading forensic science centers.

Incubator Product Design Support

Provided hands-on design mentorship and delivery support to early-stage health startups inside an incubator environment.

Fitness App User Trust Building

Designed trust-building brand for 8fit, tackling user skepticism around personal health data to reduce churn at the moment of commitment.

NHS Hospital Illustration [CW: Surgery]

On-site documentation of surgical procedures at Ninewells Hospital, created for clinical communication and training purposes.

'The Village' Stop-motion Film

Constructed realistic sets for stop-motion animated short film; planned and executed camera movement.

Book Research & Compilation

A self-authored book weaving data visualisation, research, and storytelling around astronomical mythology.

Fitness App Illustrations

Created a suite of simplified anatomy illustrations and supporting brand assets used across the 8fit product.

NHS Patient Experience

Conducted patient experience research at Ninewells Hospital, surfacing friction points in the care journey through interviews and observation.

Sand Animation

Animating to music, frame by frame, sand on light table.

Short Film Scriptwriting

Original short film script in collaboration with the director: narrative structure, character development, and scene direction from blank page to final draft.

Archaeological Publication Design

Designed print publications for Headland Archaeology: laying out complex field data maps and finds reports for academic audiences.

PLOS Biology Article Illustration

Scientific illustration commissioned for a peer-reviewed PLOS Biology article.

Designed by Mano Kapazoglou©; developed with Claude. Spray elements designed by @redgreystock on Magnific.
